description_long: This is a single right-handed glove designed for protective or performance use, likely in automotive or industrial settings. The palm side features a combination of light gray and black synthetic material with reinforced padding and ergonomic stitching for grip and durability. The back of the glove is predominantly red with a black patch and a white 'sparco' logo, indicating a racing or high-performance brand. The glove extends past the wrist, providing additional coverage and protection, and the material appears to be a flexible, semi-soft synthetic fabric, possibly with some rubberized or grippy sections. The fingers are individually contoured, with black tips and accent lines for added style and function. There are no visible closure mechanisms, suggesting a slip-on design for quick and easy wear.
description: A red and black right-handed glove with reinforced gray palm, ergonomic padding, and a visible 'sparco' logo, designed for protective or performance use.
description_view_0: Palm view showing gray and black reinforced padding, ergonomic stitching, and black-tipped fingers.
description_view_1: Side profile revealing the glove's slim, contoured shape and the transition between red and black materials.
description_view_2: Back view displaying the red exterior, black patch, and prominent white 'sparco' logo.
description_view_3: Opposite side profile, highlighting the glove's extended wrist coverage and smooth red surface.
attribute_logo: White 'sparco' text logo on the back of the glove
attribute_pattern: color-blocked with accent patches and ergonomic stitching
